# Collaborator personas

Use these markdown files as **system prompts or briefing attachments** when you want the model to adopt a specific stakeholder lens and walk Movemental site copy with you.

| Persona | File | Best for |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Movement leader peer | [movement-leader-collaborator.md](./movement-leader-collaborator.md) | Home hero, movement-leader cards, services, methodology—language aimed at authors, teachers, and movement architects |
| Youthfront-style nonprofit executive | [youthfront-executive-collaborator.md](./youthfront-executive-collaborator.md) | Nonprofit positioning, AI/governance/trust copy, fundraising and board-facing language |

**Research sources (not in this repo):** movement-leader composite draws on `dev/repos/docs/intelligence/leader-research/audience/core-audience-list.md` and related leader research; the Youthfront persona draws on `dev/repos/docs/satellite-projects/non-profit-dashboard/content/` (guides and governance).

**Site surfaces to review together:** `src/app/(site)/page.tsx`, `src/components/sections/home-*.tsx`, `src/app/(site)/who-we-serve/page.tsx`, pricing, services, evidence, FAQ.
